_comment: ~25 000 headwords gives 1-2 minutes of processing on ESP32-C3 — long enough for the user to observe processing and press Back to cancel. Each definition is ~200 bytes; 4 synonyms per word.

meta.name: prep-long
meta.author: CrossPoint Test Suite
meta.description: Medium synthetic dictionary for per-book cancel-prepare tests. All 4 steps required.
meta._comment: idx.fpi and syn.fpi are intentionally absent — the device generates them

synthetic._comment_word_prefix: selects the medium prep-long definition template
